text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, February 17. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that we need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Here is what I recommend. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Great consistency with running. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Planning for future education costs. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Budget tracking is updated. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Let's break this down. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Great consistency with running. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need secure messaging immediately. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Good focus area. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that calculating some savings estimates. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Ethan did great with his school homework. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
